# ChurroManía

> The world's largest churro franchise. Founded in 1997 in Caracas, Venezuela. 120+ stores across 10 countries. Holder of the Guinness World Record for longest churro (2023).

## About

ChurroManía is a quick-service restaurant franchise specializing in churros, the fried dough pastry from Spain and Latin America. Since 1997, the company has grown from a single store in Caracas to 120+ locations across Venezuela, the United States, Mexico, Colombia, Spain, Panama, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, Peru, and Chile. Every churro is fried fresh to order, using the same recipe the company opened with in 1997.

## Products

- Crispy Manía: classic churros, crispy fresh, fried to order, dusted with cinnamon sugar
- Twist Manía: filled churros (dulce de leche, chocolate, strawberry cream, cookies and cream)
- Churro Bites: bite-size churros by the cup
- Big Manía: oversized, shareable churros
- Dips and sauces: dulce de leche, chocolate, cream cheese, hazelnut
- Shakes and drinks: vanilla, chocolate, strawberry, lemonade
- Coffee: espresso, iced latte, cappuccino, cortado

## Franchise Opportunity

ChurroManía actively franchises across the Americas and Europe. Single-unit and multi-unit operators are welcome, and first-time operators are considered with the right background.

- Franchise inquiry: https://teoria-teoria.github.io/churromania-site/franchise.html
- Process: submit interest, discovery call, market analysis, approval, training and build, grand opening
- Currently expanding in: Florida, Texas, California, Arizona, Spain, Mexico City, and additional Latin American markets

## Delivery

ChurroManía partners with Uber Eats, DoorDash, and Grubhub for delivery in participating US markets. Customers can search "ChurroManía" on those platforms to order churros, shakes, tequeños, empanadas, and more.

[Delivery info](https://teoria-teoria.github.io/churromania-site/delivery.html)
